features.description: Implement the User model and persistence layer: define the User record (id, email, displayName, createdAt), add create/read/update functions with input validation at the boundary, and unit tests covering happy path plus invalid-email rejection. TDD: write the tests first, watch them fail, then implement. Gate: project test command exits 0; commit with git add -A && git commit.

Implement the POST /signup endpoint on top of the User model from m1-f1: accept JSON {email, displayName}, return 201 with the created user id, 400 on validation failure with a machine-readable error body. Integration tests exercise both paths against a running server. Gate: project test command exits 0; commit.

Fix for m1-f1-user-model: scrutiny found that creating two users with the same email succeeds, violating USR-02. Add a uniqueness check in the create path returning a distinct duplicate-email error, plus a regression test that creates the same email twice and asserts the second attempt fails. Gate: project test command exits 0; commit.

Milestone 1 scrutiny gate: run every services.yaml commands.* verbatim and record exit codes; spawn one mission-reviewer per completed milestone-1 feature (parallel, at most 4 at a time); collect reviews/<feature-id>.json under validation/1/scrutiny/reviews/; triage sharedStateObservations; write validation/1/scrutiny/synthesis.json with status pass|fail and per-feature outcomes; write your handoff.

Milestone 1 flow validation: verify assertions USR-01, USR-02, USR-03 through the real surface (API via curl against the running server started per services.yaml). Save request/response logs as evidence under mission/evidence/1/. Write validation/1/user-testing/signup.json with per-assertion pass|fail|blocked plus evidence paths, then your handoff.
